productDisplayName: Nike Men White Chroma Flip Flops
description: Style Noteflip flops have been in vogue since time immemorial. The nike Chroma Thong, true to its name, will add a splash of colour to your feet and life, transporting you to a world of absolute comfort and delight. They have a good grip, are comfortable, and can be worn with almost any kind of casual outfits. Product DetailsBroad synthetic straps for improved comfort, has a synthetic fabric toe separator for a soft feelStrap backing made of synthetic fabric for enhanced comfortLogo on strap with stitched detailing on straps for added styleFoam footbed with synthetic upper layer for all day comfortThong construction to hold the forefoot in placeHerringbone pattern on the rubber outsole for good gripWarranty for manufacturing defects: 6 months (not valid on products with more than 20% discount)Material and CareSyntheticWipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
